content.full_text:
**Board of Supervisors  
County of Los Angeles**

**MICHAEL D. ANTONOVICH  
SUPERVISOR FIFTH DISTRICT**

October 17, 1991

Mr. Ben Davidian  
Executive Director  
Fair Political Practices Commission  
428 "J" Street, Ste 800  
Sacramento, CA 95814

Dear Mr. Davidian:

As I mentioned on the phone there is every likelihood that the Antonovich for Senate campaign committee will be given a fine for some minor or unintentional errors.

Our attorney in D.C. has advised us that monies raised by Antonovich '88, a California committee, could be used to pay a fine if the FPPC has no objection.

I would appreciate a ruling and suggestions as to how to proceed.

Thank you for your help.

Sincerely,

Lolli Benton  
Antonovich '92  
143 So. Glendale Ave., #101  
Glendale, CA 91205  
818 546-1992
